zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges於1195年出生在法國米迪-列內斯時，他的父親Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges43歲，母親Comtors de La Barthe20歲。他於1224年5月6日與Cécile de Foix結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1241年11月30日在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛藍塔享年46歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges于1195年出生在法国米迪-列內斯时，他的父亲Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges43岁，母亲Comtors de La Barthe20岁。他于1224年5月6日与Cécile de Foix结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1241年11月30日在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛藍塔享年46岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comminges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges was born in 1195, in Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges, was 43 and his mother, Comtors de La Barthe, was 20. He married Cécile de Foix on 6 May 1224. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 30 November 1241, in Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges est né en 1195, à Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Comtors de La Barthe, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Cécile de Foix le 6 mai 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1241, à Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges 1195 in Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges 43 und seine Mutter Comtors de La Barthe 20. Er hat am 6. Mai 1224 Cécile de Foix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 30. November 1241 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges è nato il nel 1195 nel Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Comtors de La Barthe, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Cécile de Foix il 6 maggio 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 30 novembre 1241, nel Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Commingesが1195年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスで生まれた時，父Comte Bernard  IV De Commingesは43歳，母Comtors de La Bartheは20歳であった。1224年5月6日にCécile de Foixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1241年11月30日にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオンランタで46歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges(이)가 1195년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Comtors de La Barthe(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1224년 5월 6일 Cécile de Foix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1241년 11월 30일 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 랜타에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges nasceu em 1195, em Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Comtors de La Barthe, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Cécile de Foix em 6 de maio de 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1241, em Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges родился в 1195 г. в местности миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Comtors de La Barthe, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Cécile de Foix 6 мая 1224 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 30 ноября 1241 г. в местности ланта, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard V de Comminges Comte de Comminges nació en 1195, en Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Comte Bernard  IV De Comminges, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Comtors de La Barthe, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Cécile de Foix el 6 de mayo de 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1241, en Lanta, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
